name: Omnifone
notes:
Omnifone is an independent business-to-business provider of global cloud-based digital music services. Omnifone develops, licenses and manages scalable digital music services to enable customers, including Sirius XM Radio, Sony Music Unlimited, Guvera, Spotify, HP, BlackBerry, Lenovo and rara.com, to deliver cloud-based music services across virtually all connected devices. 

We recommend a max-prefix of 10.

Requirements for peering are:
- Maintain a 24x7x365 English-speaking NOC.
- Maintain up to date peeringdb records.
